title: About SylhetStay
story: SylhetStay was founded in 2021 to solve the student housing crisis in Sylhet by offering safe, affordable, and modern accommodations near major universities. What started as a single building with 20 rooms has now grown into a premier student housing complex serving hundreds of students every year.
mission: To provide the best student living experience in Bangladesh — one room at a time.
vision: A Bangladesh where no student has to worry about where to sleep during their studies.

core_values.title: Safety First
core_values.description: 24/7 security, CCTV surveillance, and strict visitor protocols ensure our residents are always safe.

core_values.title: Community Driven
core_values.description: We foster a vibrant, inclusive community where students from all backgrounds feel at home.

core_values.title: Affordability
core_values.description: Quality accommodation at prices that don't break the bank for students and their families.

core_values.title: Continuous Improvement
core_values.description: We constantly upgrade our facilities based on resident feedback and modern standards.

nearby_universities.name: SUST
nearby_universities.full_name: Shahjalal University of Science and Technology

achievements.title: Best Student Housing Dhaka Tribune Award
achievements.description: Recognized as the best student accommodation provider in Sylhet division.

achievements.title: 1000 Residents Milestone
achievements.description: Celebrated hosting our 1000th resident since opening.

achievements.title: Green Building Certification
achievements.description: Received eco-friendly building certification for sustainable practices.

achievements.title: Expansion Launch
achievements.description: Opened our second wing with 30 additional rooms and new facilities.

timeline.description: SylhetStay was established with 20 rooms in a single building.
Added 15 more rooms and common kitchen facilities.
Launched premium single rooms and deluxe suites.
Added gym, study lounge, and entertainment room.
Opened a second wing with 30 more rooms and rooftop garden.
Launched online booking, virtual tours, and automated payment system.
